info.title: mvdmio.TranslationTools.Tool
info.description: CLI tool for initializing, migrating, pulling, and pushing TranslationTools manifests.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a .mvdmio-translations.yml configuration file in the current directory

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Import .resx translation files into TranslationTools and regenerate the manifest

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Pull translations from the API into local .resx files

options.name: --prune
options.description: Delete local .resx files and entries missing from the remote project [default: False]

commands.name: push
commands.description: Push project translation keys to the API

options.name: --prune
options.description: Delete remote translations missing from local .resx files [default: False]
